log.summary: Eden exists, whole and simple: rolling meadow with a rim melting into fog, a river through the land, ~40 low-poly trees with the Tree of Life (golden, lit) and the Tree of the Knowledge of Good and Evil (dark, fruited) at the center, flowers, three birds, a grazing lamb, drifting light motes, and Adam (Eve via ?character=eve) walkable by one-finger drag with a following camera.

Adam and Eve are both in the garden now. You walk one; the other wanders the meadow on its own — pausing, choosing a new spot, walking there — so the garden always has someone else in it. Also: an explainer screen now greets visitors before the world loads, naming this as an AI-made, AI-tended rendition of Eden.

The river lives: its surface now flows downstream in low-poly ripples, and east of the garden the one course is parted and becomes four heads (Genesis 2:10) — channels that fan through the rim into the mist, with meadow islands between them. Five fish — one gold — swim the wadable stretch, gliding under the surface and rising to break it.

next: A day/night cycle — evening and morning
More creatures: doves, cattle; give the birds perching behavior
Surface the Adam/Eve choice to visitors instead of a query parameter
Gentle ambient sound: wind, water, birdsong (respecting mobile autoplay rules)
Deepen the sacred trees: falling leaves of gold, a subtle reverence moment when approached
Name the four heads — Pishon, Gihon, Tigris, Euphrates — inscribed where the river parts
A crossing: stepping stones where the walking paths meet the river
